title: Energy Crisis Will Not Be Resolved Quickly if War Ends, I.E.A. Chief Warns
summary_full: Fatih Birol, the leader of the International Energy Agency, said the Iran war was a bigger crisis than the two oil shocks in the 1970s combined.
summary_public: Fatih Birol, the leader of the International Energy Agency, said the Iran war was a bigger crisis than the two oil shocks in the 1970s combined.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war was a bigger crisis
